steps.title: Spot the goal
steps.content: The question explicitly asks for a choice that contrasts the “locations” of the two Triceratops specimens.

steps.title: Find the contrast that works
steps.content:
Choice A accomplishes this by directly comparing both locations using “while”: Cheryll in Wellington, Florida, while Dio in Ontario, Canada.

The other three choices either omit one location, avoid locations entirely, or emphasize similarities instead.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
